docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JYASF INC. (JOHN YADEGAR) AS TO DEFENDANT LE, CARL (CITADEL RE INVESTMENTS) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

ORDER RE: DISMISSAL (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
